info.title: Job Listings Aggregator API
info.description: Job Listings Aggregator API. Scrapes job listings from company career pages or ATS platforms including Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, BambooHR, and Ashby. Returns structured job data with department, location, type, and apply URL. Supports filtering by location, department, and remote status. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Scrapes job listings from company career pages or ATS platforms including Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, BambooHR, and Ashby. Returns structured job data with department, location, type, and apply URL. Supports filtering by location, department, and remote status.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
